method: nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used polled every 400 ms for the whole lifetime of each run (whole-GPU used memory, RTX 4070 Ti); single seed; runs under output/synth/mem_probe (dentistry repo), tags torus_C0_r0.1_s0 / torus_C1_r0.1_s0, exact protocol flags (--steps 2500 --max_faces 700 --loss_dims 1 --rhos 0.1)
note: values transcribed verbatim from the probe log (scratchpad mem_probe.ps1, session 36b8d183, task buf0eysm2); polling at 400 ms can miss sub-400ms spikes
